name: Content Audit Template
description: Content Audit Template - Marketing template for content professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1 Go to Content Inventory and list all your web content with URLs, titles, types, and metadata Step 2 Complete the SEO Analysis tab with target keywords, rankings, and search volume data Step 3 Input Performance Data including sessions, bounce rates, conversions, and social metrics Step 4 Review the Dashboard for auto-calculated summary metrics and insights Step 5 Use Content Scoring to rank content quality, relevance, SEO, and performance Step 6 Identify gaps using the Gap Analysis tab against competitor content Step 7 Create your Action Plan prioritizing which c
